name: Black Forest Cherry Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread cherry pie filling evenly in the bottom of an ungreased 9x13 baking dish.
2. Cover the cherry pie filling with crushed pineapple.
3. Sprinkle dry chocolate cake mix over the pineapple layer.
4. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the top of the cake mix.
5. Spread thinly sliced margarine evenly over the pecans.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
7. Allow the crisp to cool completely before serving.
8. Once cooled, cover with whipped cream or Cool Whip and garnish with maraschino cherries, if desired.
